vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of severe degradation. The expected registry (P1-P4) is largely absent or non-viable. The white rabbit anchor is present in the P3/P4 zone, but the botanical specimens are not visible or have suffered total collapse.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible in the black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: Pothos is absent; only the white rabbit anchor remains.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor present; no Pothos foliage detected.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dry and compacted across all visible pots.
biome_observations.surface_debris: A metal spoon is present in the T-2 image, indicating human intervention/tool usage. No fungal growth or moss detected.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t3: Initial state shows empty pots. No plants were present at the start of the sequence.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Introduction of a metal spoon (intervention) near the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_t1: Removal of the metal spoon; pots remain empty.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: No change; the biome remains in a state of total botanical absence.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-functional. There is no evidence of plant life, suggesting either a failure to germinate, total plant death, or that the pots are currently unplanted.
anomalies: Systemic Absence: All registered plants (P1-P4) are missing from the visual field.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a completely barren environment. Despite the registry, there is no botanical life present in any of the pots. The only notable event in the 5-day sequence was the temporary placement of a metal spoon near the yellow pot, which was subsequently removed. The environment is currently static and devoid of vegetation.
